name: mortar
description: minimal fill-in-middle autocomplete backed by a remote llama.cpp or openai-compatible server

mortar.endpoint.description: base url of the inference server (e.g. http://localhost:7860). a trailing /v1 or /infill is stripped automatically.

mortar.model.description: model name to request (e.g. qwen3-coder-30b-a3b-instruct:Q8_0). optional if the server has a single loaded model.

mortar.apiKey.description: optional bearer token sent as Authorization header.

mortar.mode.description: auto: probe /infill, fall back to /v1/completions. infill: force native llama.cpp /infill. openai: force /v1/completions with a fim prompt template.

mortar.openaiPromptTemplate.description: prompt template for openai mode. placeholders: {prefix} {prompt} {suffix}.

mortar.openaiStopStrings.description: stop strings used in openai mode.

mortar.nPrefix.description: number of lines before the cursor to include as input_prefix.

mortar.nSuffix.description: number of lines after the cursor to include as input_suffix.

mortar.tMaxPromptMs.description: max alloted time for prompt processing (native infill only).

mortar.tMaxPredictMs.description: max alloted time for prediction (native infill only).

mortar.debounceMs.description: debounce delay before an automatic completion fires.

mortar.maxLineSuffix.description: skip automatic completion if more than this many characters follow the cursor on the current line.

mortar.maxCacheKeys.description: max entries in the lru completion cache.

mortar.statusBar.description: show the mortar status bar indicator.

mortar.statusBarTimings.description: show completion timings inline in the status bar text. when false, timings are only visible in the tooltip.

mortar.ringNChunks.description: max number of chunks from recently-edited buffers to send as extra context. 0 disables.

mortar.prefetch.description: speculatively fetch the next completion assuming the current one is accepted, and cache it.

commands.title: Mortar: Accept Next Line of Completion
Mortar: Accept Next Word of Completion

scripts.precommit: npm run lint && npm run compile && npm run test
